text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head to the academy roof for a breather, only to
find someone already there.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Not bad for something I put together on break.
I'm glad I could put the melody I gave up on
before to use as well.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
That said, the tempo shifts could still use some
refining, but—

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Didn't anyone ever teach you to announce
yourself?!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...Well, since you're here anyway, you may as well
tell me what you think.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With ample time to work on her music production
hobby, Air Shakur is able to spend a good day
off.
